channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Side projects vs client work: the 40-hour balance
item.description: Cut weekend sacrifice by 51% with the time blocking pattern — measure your unpaid hours, client quality scores, and side project completion rates over 8 weeks.

item.title: RAG pipelines fail at 10k RPM
item.description: Cut RAG cost 67% and errors 92% at 10k RPM with Milvus+ClickHouse — the real stack that handles catalog churn and concurrency most tutorials ignore.

item.title: Node.js memory leak: detect it in 7 minutes flat
item.description: Cut Node.js memory leaks by 100% in production — detect leaks in 7 minutes, fix unbounded caches, closures, and Kubernetes misconfigs, with exact error messages and tools.

item.title: Queue when to queue: save yourself 3am fires
item.description: Cut 6ms latency and 80% on-call pages by swapping thread pools for RabbitMQ queues — payload tuning, prefetch traps, and the disk I/O surprise when durability matters

item.title: Run a local LLM on a laptop — here’s the catch
item.description: Cut LLM latency to under 100ms on a laptop with 16GB RAM — the real constraints, model sizes that work, and the mistakes that break the setup. local LLM setup guide with benchmarks and thermal limits.

item.title: We moved security left without slowing deploys
item.description: We cut PR merge time 31% and critical vulnerabilities 87% by turning security into a measurable signal instead of a gate. Here’s how we instrumented GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, and Prometheus to shift security left without slowing deploys.

item.title: AI reads your codebase: the context gap you missed
item.description: Cut onboarding time by 38% with repository intelligence — measure grep loops and onboarding hours before you index your 50k-file monorepo

item.title: MCP servers cut 80% boilerplate. Here’s why.
item.description: Cut MCP server latency by 80% with this guide—schema validation, rate limiting, and the mistakes that break production systems. Learn when to use MCP, when to avoid it, and how to debug it in real code.

item.title: AI systems: the hard parts no tutorial covers
item.description: Cut API response time by 60% and cloud costs by 70% with a FastAPI + vLLM + pgvector stack. Real benchmarks, code, and the failure modes most tutorials skip.

item.title: Cut AWS bill 40%: Graviton + spot now
item.description: Cut your AWS bill 40% by combining Graviton processors and Spot Instances — real benchmarks, concrete steps, and the mistakes that cost teams before they succeeded. Validate binary compatibility, pick the right instance families, and measure performance-per-dollar.

item.title: Redis vs Memcached: which cache breaks first?
item.description: Cut API response time by 40% with Redis or Memcached — 278k ops/sec under TLS, eviction storms, and the $286/month cost gap uncovered in 30-day AWS tests.

item.title: Made $32k to $190k in 3 years: the moves that stuck
item.description: Made $32k to $190k in 3 years: the moves that stuck — cut AWS costs 33%, raised hourly rate 6x, and built a global freelance business from Accra. Learn the exact steps, tools, and contracts that turned local salary into global income.

item.title: Rate limit at the edge, not in the core
item.description: Cut API P99 latency from 8 seconds to 12ms and slash Redis costs 27% by moving rate limiting to Envoy’s edge filter and caching locally — the mistakes, numbers, and config snippets that actually worked.

item.title: 4 tools the pros keep quiet about
item.description: Cut API latency from 450 ms to 80 ms on a $12/month budget with four tools nobody talks about — PM2, Playwright, pino, and Caddy.

item.title: 5 real-time tricks without WebSockets
item.description: Cut real-time latency by 60% under 6 k updates/sec without WebSockets — SSE, HTTP/2 Push, WebTransport benchmarks, $3.20 per million updates, Safari 60s timeout fix included.

item.title: Pick PostgreSQL 2026: the 3 benchmarks that decide
item.description: PostgreSQL beats MySQL by 60% latency and 3x recovery speed — benchmarks from 2026 workloads on identical hardware. See the exact PostgreSQL 16 and MySQL 8.3 numbers and the one-line code swap that proves it.

item.title: Edge functions: 80ms p99 at $0.02 per million
item.description: Cut API response time to 80ms p99 and costs to $0.02 per million with Workers or Edge — benchmarks, code, and failure modes from a 50M request/month system.

item.title: Is $100/month AI coding worth it?
item.description: Cut AI coding costs by 60% with gated pipelines and sparse context — measured with GPT-4o, Stripe, and Vercel previews under $0.05 per diff

item.title: Build or glue: when no-code beats code
item.description: Cut 6–12 engineering weeks by choosing between no-code and custom code with this decision framework — includes concrete benchmarks, cost curves, and a worked Retool vs Next.js example.

item.title: Freelance burnout: how I fixed it in 3 weeks
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 68% in 3 weeks by enforcing response windows, scheduling recovery blocks, and measuring HRV. Real fixes that worked for me.
